title: Federal Interagency Sustainable Aviation Fuel Progress Metrics and $12 Million in Funding to Support the Advancement of Integrated Biorefinery Technologies
content: Interagency team led by the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE), U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA), and U.S. Department of Transportation's (DOTâ€™s) Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) released the Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) Grand Challenge: Metrics Dashboard Fact Sheet. Supporting the SAF Grand Challenge, BETO also announced today $12 million in funding to support the advancement of integrated biorefinery technologies to decarbonize the transportation and industrial sector.
author: Analysts Account
source: Office of Energy Efficiency & Renewable Energy
